test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with all fields (name, bio, born_year) returns 201 and correct response.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_optional_fields
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with only required field (name) returns 201.

test_cases.name: create_author_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with a duplicate name returns 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_author_invalid_name_length
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with name exceeding 100 characters returns 422.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving an existing author returns 200 and correct data.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_match
test_cases.description: Verify conditional GET with If-None-Match matching ETag returns 304.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify updating an author with valid data returns 200.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verify updating an author with If-Match ETag mismatch returns 412.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an author with no associated books returns 204.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an author with associated books returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with all required fields returns 201.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with duplicate ISBN returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with ISBN shorter than 10 characters returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_pagination
test_cases.description: Verify listing books with pagination returns 200 and correct structure.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verify listing books with filters (author_id, category_id, min_price) returns 200.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving an existing book returns 200 and correct data.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verify applying discount to a book published more than 1 year ago returns 200.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verify applying discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verify applying discount exceeding rate limit (5 req/10s) returns 429.

test_cases.name: update_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verify updating stock with valid quantity returns 200.

test_cases.name: update_stock_resulting_in_negative
test_cases.description: Verify updating stock resulting in negative value returns 400.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verify uploading a valid JPEG cover image returns 200.

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type
test_cases.description: Verify uploading an unsupported file type returns 415.

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verify uploading a cover image larger than 2MB returns 413.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book
test_cases.description: Verify creating a review for a book returns 201.

test_cases.name: create_review_with_invalid_rating
test_cases.description: Verify creating a review with rating outside 1-5 range returns 422.

test_cases.name: clone_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify cloning a book with valid new ISBN returns 201.

test_cases.name: clone_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verify cloning a book with duplicate ISBN returns 409.
